# mailgun_domain_ips (Data Source)

Retrieves IP addresses associated with a Mailgun domain.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `domain` (String) The domain name to retrieve IP addresses for.

### Read-Only

- `ips` (Attributes List) List of IP addresses associated with the domain. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ips))

<a id="nestedatt--ips"></a>
### Nested Schema for `ips`

Read-Only:

- `ip` (String) The IP address.
